Bizarre Lineage Awakening Guide

Unlock your Stand's ultimate power. Awakening grants a devastating H-ability and visual transformation.

Leveling Prestige Awakening

Awakening Requirements

  1. Player Level 50 — reach max character level
  2. Conjuration Level 100 — max out your Stand's skill tree
  3. Complete Awakening Quest — a multi-step challenge

Step-by-Step Awakening Process

1

Meet the Requirements

Reach Level 50 and get your Stand Conjuration to 100. You can check your Conjuration level in the Stand menu (G → Stats).

2

Visit the Gym

Go to the Gym (Bus Stop 2) and sit on the meditation mat.

3

Start the Quest

Choose "I want to surpass my limits" when prompted. This begins the Awakening quest chain.

4

Complete Raid Objectives

Defeat the following bosses in raid instances:

  • Jotaro Kujo — Star Platinum fight
  • Muhammad Avdol — Fire Stand fight
  • DIO — Final boss encounter
5

Complete World Events

Finish 50 World Events. These spawn at regular intervals across the map.

6

Activate Awakening

After completing all objectives, press H to trigger your Stand's ultimate awakening ability!

Awakening Tips

  • Boss raids can be done in groups — bring allies for easier clears
  • World Events have a visual indicator on the map — check the minimap (N) regularly
  • Some Stands have unique awakening transformations (e.g., Whitesnake → C-Moon)
  • The H ability has a long cooldown — save it for clutch moments in PvP
  • Awakened Stands gain a visual aura that shows your achievement to other players

💡 Pro Tip

Some Stands evolve through a different path than standard awakening. Whitesnake evolves into C-Moon (with Green Baby) and then Made in Heaven (with DIO's Bone). Check each Stand's page in our Stands Database for specific evolution paths.
